title: phyllanthus gongyloides
intro: Phyllanthus gongyloides, also known as Gongylodaphne or Gynandra, is a plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, digestive issues, and skin problems, due to its potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving immune function. In herbal preparations, Phyllanthus gongyloides is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
